Project: Omega

Neural
Interfacing

Redefining the boundary between biological cognition and synthetic processing. Our proprietary bio-linkage protocols achieve sub-millisecond latency for direct cortical-silicon data transfer.

Technical Specifications

Bandwidth

4.2 TB/s

Aggregate synaptic throughput across 12-node cluster.

Latency

0.85 ms

End-to-end signal propagation from motor cortex.

Biocompatibility

Grade 9

Proprietary hydrogel coating prevents tissue rejection.

Architecture

RISC-N

Neural-optimized instruction set for rapid compute.

hub

Neural-Mesh Synthesis

Visualizing the real-time interaction between biological neurons and synthetic interface nodes.

timeline Project Timeline

Q1 2023
Initial Synthesis

Successful lab-grown neuron integration with Gen-1 silicon substrate.

Q4 2023
Latency Breach

Achieved sub-1ms signal transfer for the first time in history.

Q2 2024
In Vivo Trials

Phase II human-analog trials demonstrating 98% compatibility.

CURRENT
Clinical Launch

Scaling production of the Delta-class neuro-processor.
